description: Detects integer overflow risks in C++: unchecked multiplication in new[] allocation, signed-to-size_t casts, size_t subtraction underflow. Simplified from Rust per D-07: flags new_expression nodes broadly (cannot verify multiplication operand types or detect cast expressions without deep AST traversal).

flag.message: new expression detected -- verify new T[a*b] does not perform unchecked integer multiplication (integer overflow leads to undersized allocation). Verify signed-to-size_t casts are safe (negative values wrap to large positive). Check size_t subtraction for underflow.
